activeGoal: 修复 extension 前端对 EventSource SSE `error` 事件的误判问题。当前 `/api/runs/{runId}/events` 已返回 200 OK 且会重连，但插件将任何 `error` 事件都显示为 `SS
designSummary: TASK-036 refinement for direct coding: preserve Chrome Extension -> Python adapter -> opencode serve chain and existing SSE payload structure. Limit implementation to extension SSE client behavior and minimal side panel consumption. createRunEventStream in extension/src/shared/api.ts should distinguish initial connect failure from post-connect transient EventSource error/reconnect and from expected close after terminal result/error events. Side panel should avoid surfacing transient EventSource error as terminal user error and may optionally show reconnecting via local stream state only.
designDecisions: Decision for TASK-036: 在 extension/src/shared/api.ts 的 createRunEventStream() 引入最小本地状态机标记（hasConnected、hasReceivedEvent、terminalEventReceived、closedByClient，必要时可含 reconnectSince）。EventSource.onerror 仅在从未成功建立连接且尚未收到任何业务事件时上报 SSE connection failed；已连接后的 error 视为浏览器重连或暂态断流，不直接报错，而通过最小 onStatusChange/等价通知让 side panel 呈现 reconnecting。收到 result 或 error 终止事件后应先设置 terminalEventReceived 再 close，后续 error/close 一律静默。若已有事件但长期未恢复，可由前端本地容忍窗口转为失败，但不改协议。

TASK-036 decision: implement a minimal client-side EventSource state machine in extension/src/shared/api.ts with flags such as hasConnected, hasReceivedEvent, terminalEventReceived, and closedByClient. onerror before any successful stream message may map to user-visible connection failure; onerror after connection or after any valid event must be treated as transient/non-fatal reconnect unless a separate local timeout policy is later added. When result or error terminal business events arrive, mark terminalEventReceived before closing EventSource so subsequent browser error callbacks are ignored.

tasks.summary: Completed approved fix for extension SSE error misclassification by adjusting only extension-side SSE client state machine and validating with extension tests/typecheck/build.
tasks.details: Completed approved fix for extension SSE error misclassification by adjusting only extension-side SSE client state machine and validating with extension tests/typecheck/build.

tasks.title: Implement SSE client error-state refinement for TASK-036
tasks.summary: Implemented minimal EventSource SSE client state machine with open/message/error handling, terminal close suppression, and reconnect status updates in extension SSE client.
tasks.details: Implemented minimal EventSource SSE client state machine with open/message/error handling, terminal close suppression, and reconnect status updates in extension SSE client.

tasks.title: Update side panel stream handling tests for TASK-036
tasks.summary: Updated side panel stream status handling and added regression tests covering initial failure, reconnecting, terminal close/error suppression, and recovery after reopen.
tasks.details: Updated side panel stream status handling and added regression tests covering initial failure, reconnecting, terminal close/error suppression, and recovery after reopen.

tasks.title: Fix extension SSE null schema parsing
tasks.summary: Completed minimal SSE schema compatibility fix by accepting null question/data values in extension stream event parsing and normalizing them to undefined for existing consumers. Added regression tests for question:null, data:null, and valid question events; extension test/typecheck/build all passed.
tasks.details: Completed minimal SSE schema compatibility fix by accepting null question/data values in extension stream event parsing and normalizing them to undefined for existing consumers. Added regression tests for question:null, data:null, and valid question events; extension test/typecheck/build all passed.

qa.summary: QA passed for extension SSE null schema compatibility fix. Verified extension/src/shared/api.ts streamEventSchema uses nullableOptional preprocessing so question/data accept null and normalize to undefined (lines 38-41, 52-61). Verified regression tests in extension/src/shared/api.test.ts cover question:null, data:null, and valid question events without onError calls (lines 114-209). Verified side panel reconnect/status handling test does not surface terminal SSE/zod error during non-terminal status changes in extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx (lines 245-282), and App onError only sets streamError if parsing fails (App.tsx lines 329-340). Commands passed in /extension: npm test (43/43), npm run typecheck, npm run build.
qa.details: QA passed for extension SSE null schema compatibility fix. Verified extension/src/shared/api.ts streamEventSchema uses nullableOptional preprocessing so question/data accept null and normalize to undefined (lines 38-41, 52-61). Verified side panel reconnect/status handling test does not surface terminal SSE/zod error during non-terminal status changes in extension/src/sidepanel/App.test.tsx (lines 245-282), and App onError only sets streamError if parsing fails (App.tsx lines 329-340). Commands passed in /extension: npm test (43/43), npm run typecheck, npm run build.
